info.title: Gfycat API
info.description: Gfycat API for creating, managing, and discovering short looping GIF-like videos (gfycats). Supports uploading, searching, and managing user content.

post.description: Authenticate and obtain an OAuth2 access token using client credentials, authorization code, password grant, or refresh token.
Create a new gfycat from a URL or initiate a file upload. Returns a gfyname to use for uploading the file.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific gfycat by its ID.

put.description: Update the title, tags, or other metadata of a gfycat owned by the authenticated user.

delete.description: Delete a gfycat owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Check the encoding status of a gfycat that was recently created or uploaded.
Check the status of a gfycat created from a URL fetch.
Retrieve a list of currently trending gfycats.
Search for gfycats matching the given search text.
Retrieve a list of currently trending tags.
Retrieve trending tags along with sample gfycats for each tag.
Retrieve public profile information for a user.
Retrieve gfycats published by a specific user.
Retrieve the profile of the currently authenticated user.

put.description: Update the profile information of the currently authenticated user.

get.description: Retrieve gfycats belonging to the currently authenticated user.
Retrieve albums belonging to the currently authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new album for the authenticated user.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific album.

put.description: Update album title, description, or contents.

get.description: Retrieve list of users followed by the authenticated user.
Retrieve list of users following the authenticated user.
Retrieve the timeline feed for the authenticated user, including gfycats from followed users.
Retrieve popular reaction categories with sample gfycats.

refresh_token_expires_in.description: Refresh token expiry time in seconds

fetchUrl.description: URL of a video/GIF to convert into a gfycat

contents.description: Array of gfycat IDs to add to the album
